'''songamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabled|cabled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabled|cabled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| songamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:songamithi|songamithi]] || [[word:songamiji|songamiji]] || [[word:songamishi|songamishi]] || [[word:songamiki|songamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:songamuthuthu|songamuthuthu]] || [[word:songamujuju|songamujuju]] || [[word:songamushushu|songamushushu]] || [[word:songamukuku|songamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:songamuthu|songamuthu]] || [[word:songamuju|songamuju]] || [[word:songamushu|songamushu]] || [[word:songamuku|songamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:songamufthuf|songamufthuf]] || [[word:songamufjuf|songamufjuf]] || [[word:songamufshuf|songamufshuf]] || [[word:songamufkuf|songamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:songamethe|songamethe]] || [[word:songameje|songameje]] || [[word:songameshe|songameshe]] || [[word:songameke|songameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:songamothotho|songamothotho]] || [[word:songamojojo|songamojojo]] || [[word:songamoshosho|songamoshosho]] || [[word:songamokoko|songamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:songamotho|songamotho]] || [[word:songamojo|songamojo]] || [[word:songamosho|songamosho]] || [[word:songamoko|songamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:songamofthof|songamofthof]] || [[word:songamofjof|songamofjof]] || [[word:songamofshof|songamofshof]] || [[word:songamofkof|songamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:songamïfthïf|songamïfthïf]] || [[word:songamïfjïf|songamïfjïf]] || [[word:songamïfshïf|songamïfshïf]] || [[word:songamïfkïf|songamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:songamïfthïfthïf|songamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:songamïfjïfjïf|songamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:songamïfshïfshïf|songamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:songamïfkïfkïf|songamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:songamïfthïf|songamïfthïf]] || [[word:songamïfjïf|songamïfjïf]] || [[word:songamïfshïf|songamïfshïf]] || [[word:songamïfkïf|songamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:songamïfthïf|songamïfthïf]] || [[word:songamïfjïf|songamïfjïf]] || [[word:songamïfshïf|songamïfshïf]] || [[word:songamïfkïf|songamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:songamæthæ|songamæthæ]] || [[word:songamæjæ|songamæjæ]] || [[word:songamæshæ|songamæshæ]] || [[word:songamækæ|songamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:songamathatha|songamathatha]] || [[word:songamajaja|songamajaja]] || [[word:songamashasha|songamashasha]] || [[word:songamakaka|songamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:songamatha|songamatha]] || [[word:songamaja|songamaja]] || [[word:songamasha|songamasha]] || [[word:songamaka|songamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:songamafthaf|songamafthaf]] || [[word:songamafjaf|songamafjaf]] || [[word:songamafshaf|songamafshaf]] || [[word:songamafkaf|songamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:songamasha|songamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:songamshësha|songamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:songamrosha|songamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:songamusha|songamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:songamyasha|songamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosongamnkshësha|gosongamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosongamnkrosha|gosongamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosongamnkmusha|gosongamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosongamnkyasha|gosongamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:songangamasha|songangamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:songangamshësha|songangamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:songangamrosha|songangamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:songangamusha|songangamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:songangamyasha|songangamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosongangamnkshësha|gosongangamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosongangamnkrosha|gosongangamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosongangamnkmusha|gosongangamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosongangamnkyasha|gosongangamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sengæmasha|sengæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sengæmshësha|sengæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sengæmrosha|sengæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sengæmusha|sengæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sengæmyasha|sengæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosengæmnkshësha|gosengæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosengæmnkrosha|gosengæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosengæmnkmusha|gosengæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosengæmnkyasha|gosengæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:songfamasha|songfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:songfamshësha|songfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:songfamrosha|songfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:songfamusha|songfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:songfamyasha|songfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosongfamnkshësha|gosongfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosongfamnkrosha|gosongfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosongfamnkmusha|gosongfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosongfamnkyasha|gosongfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
